description: AI-powered claims intake, damage assessment, and settlement recommendation engine for insurance claims processing

agents.name: Claims Intake Agent
agents.description: Processes initial claim submissions, validates documentation completeness, identifies claim type and priority, and flags missing documents for expedited resolution

agents.name: Damage Assessor
agents.description: Analyzes submitted evidence and documentation to evaluate damage severity, estimate repair and replacement costs, and assess evidence quality for accurate claim valuation

agents.name: Settlement Recommender
agents.description: Generates settlement recommendations based on policy coverage, damage assessment, comparable settlements, and confidence scoring for fair and consistent claim resolution
